name: Wha Yu Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Wha Yu Industrial Co., Ltd. provides antenna products for wireless transmission industry primarily in Taiwan and Hong Kong. It offers telecommunication BTS, in building coverage optimization, outdoor coverage optimization, GPS, automotive, Wi-Fi, LTE, DSRC, walkie talkie, various embedded, military, maritime, telematics, mmWave active, handheld game console, small cell, and dispenser antennas, as well as NFC antennas/modules, alarm devices, RFID products, electronic cable assemblies, and BSD blind spot detection radars. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
